title: Germany Pack  (DRE)
description: An pack full of german textures
body:
German Language Textures: Blocks, items, and signs now feature German-style designs.
IDE Gaps Fixed: Corrects texture alignment issues and gaps to ensure a seamless look.
High-Quality Textures: Crisp, detailed visuals for an immersive experience.
Vanilla-Compatible: Works with standard Minecraft gameplay without affecting mods.
